title: Roanoke Resources
description: Roanoke Resources provides Roanoke's custom textures and GUIs for the Roanoke Cobblemon Network.
body:
# Roanoke Resources - Roanoke Cobblemon Network Resource Pack

This Resource Pack adds all of our custom textures used on our server. It also adds some graphical features, like logos. It's pretty much a requirement for playing, enjoy!
